title: Nami Looks for Sky Island Clues
description: The Straw Hats enter Jaya’s rough pirate port, where rumors, salvage crews, and violent pirates make the dream of Sky Island look foolish.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene centers on Nami, Bellamy, Masira, Mock Town pirate, Luffy. The Straw Hats enter Jaya’s rough pirate port, where rumors, salvage crews, and violent pirates make the dream of Sky Island look foolish.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Luffy! What's wrong!? Are you dead!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Whoa! What the hell is that!?

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Why's it night all of a sudden?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Luffy! Help us get the sail down!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Steal my treasures and just get away!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hee hee! Found a whole bunch!

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: B.... B... Boss! W-W-W... Watch out!

summary: The Straw Hats enter Jaya’s rough pirate port, where rumors, salvage crews, and violent pirates make the dream of Sky Island look foolish.
